problem id: 0b3cf93f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  11111100 -> 00011111
  00011110 -> 11001100
  00010000 -> 10100000
  00100011 -> 01011111
  11011001 -> 01111100
  10011011 -> 11101010
  00110110 -> 11011101
  11000111 -> 10110000
  11001100 -> 11111110
  11101001 -> 10011101

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 10011001
